description: Vertical pump for mixing and pumping bentonite slurry/heavy mud during piling and civil work. Strong mixing action in tank; hanging type; customisation available.

Pump’s out Mixer directly to recycler

description: Vertical pumps are designed to remain submerged in the liquid to be pumped. They use a top cantilever type bearing housing to support the long shaft. The motor stool is MS fabricated and holds the bearing housing and gland packing box.

description: AAC Pump designed to withstand abrasive pond ash and sand gravels. Heavy-duty cantilever bearing housing, EN-8 shaft, vortex open impeller, and high chrome construction for robust performance.
